pi_items.source: Web search and data file verification; SPY is the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust trading on NYSE Arca
Direct inspection of SPY.Last.txt data file; Jan 1-2, 2023 are non-trading days (weekend/holiday)
Direct inspection of SPY.Last.txt data file; last trading day matches claim
Calculation of US market trading days 2023-2024 and direct line count of SPY.Last.txt; 252 trading days in 2023 + 251 in 2024 = 503 business days; actual file has 502 rows (accounting for holidays)
Web search on technical analysis standards; SMA (Simple Moving Average) is a standard technical indicator
Web search on technical analysis; 50-period SMA is a standard intermediate-term trend indicator
Web search on technical analysis standards; RSI (Relative Strength Index) is a standard technical indicator developed by J. Welles Wilder
Web search on RSI; 14-period RSI is Wilder's recommended default and most commonly used period
import_data.ps1 script references 'Yahoo Finance historical data'; SPY.Last.txt file contains real historical data with proper OHLCV format and realistic price/volume values

privileged_info_summary: SPY is the real State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. The dataset contains 502 daily trading bars of real historical OHLCV data from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024, sourced from Yahoo Finance. The metadata correctly specifies two standard technical indicators: SMA(50) for intermediate-term trend analysis and RSI(14) using Wilder's formula. The minimum row count of 480 is conservative and reasonable given the actual data contains 502 trading bars across the specified 2-year period.
